englishDefinitions: To treat an actor harshly, criticize them repeatedly, or make the role very physically demanding.
To attack or insult an actor, literally or figuratively.
persianTranslation: بازیگر را شدیداً تحت فشار گذاشتن
examples: The director didn’t want to beat up on an actor during rehearsals.
That role really beats up on an actor emotionally and physically.
He felt the film beat up on an actor more than necessary.
